base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of volcano_tileset — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Gurgu Volcano — lava flows, rock-ledges (384×128) largest dungeon tileset. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
